title: The Cycle of Water Quality Degradation from Improper E-Waste Management
description: A flowchart illustrating how improper disposal of electronic waste (e-waste) can lead to the contamination of water resources, affecting both availability and quality.
elements: Leachate Formation (Heavy Metals, Brominated Flame Retardants)
relationships: Improper disposal leads to Leachate Formation via rainfall/percolation
Inadequate treatment or direct exposure leads to Health Impacts
